title: lyonia catesbaei
intro: Lyonia catesbaei, also known as the mountain holly or Catesby's panicle-berry, is a type of flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia catesbaei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Lyonia catesbaei is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
